name: agent-library
description: Portable Claude Code agents for consumer (B2C) product research, marketing, prioritization, and design.

plugins.name: product-agents
plugins.description: research, marketing, evaluation, and design subagents for B2C consumer product improvement — grounded in real growth/retention/monetization patterns, RICE-based prioritization, and current UI/UX research. Bundles frozen (locally-owned, MIT/Apache-2.0 licensed) copies of third-party reference skills, not live plugin dependencies.
